---
title: "Calculator: Highest common factor, lowest common multiple"
author: Tom Coleman
format: html
abstract-title: Summary
abstract: A calculator to provide highest common factors and lowest common multiples for two integers.
---

```{r, setup, include = FALSE}
library("webexercises")
```


```{=html}

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0"/>
  <title>Highest common factor and lowest common multiple calculator</title>
  <style>
    :root {
      --btn-color: #3f68b6;
      --btn-color-hover: #345597;
      --bg: #f7f9fc;
      --card: #ffffff;
      --text: #1f2937;
      --muted: #6b7280;
      --error: #b63f3f;
      --focus: #74a0ff;
    }
    * { box-sizing: border-box; }
    body {
      margin: 0; padding: 2rem;
      background: var(--bg); color: var(--text);
      font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, Segoe UI, Roboto, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif;
    }
    .container {
      max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto;
      background: var(--card);
      border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 10px 30px rgba(16,24,40,.08);
      padding: 1.75rem;
    }
    h1 { font-size: 1.4rem; margin: 0 0 1rem; }
    p.helper { color: var(--muted); margin: 0 0 1.25rem; }

    .grid {
      display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 1rem;
    }
    @media (min-width: 520px) {
      .grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; }
    }

    label { font-weight: 600; display: block; margin-bottom: .5rem; }
    input[type="text"] {
      width: 100%; padding: .75rem .85rem;
      border: 1px solid #e5e7eb; border-radius: 8px;
      font-size: 1rem;
      outline: none; transition: border .15s, box-shadow .15s;
    }
    input[type="text"]:focus {
      border-color: var(--focus);
      box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(116,160,255,.25);
    }
    .error { color: var(--error); font-size: .95rem; margin-top: .25rem; min-height: 1.2em; }

    .buttons {
      display: grid; gap: .75rem; margin: 1.25rem 0 0;
      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
    }
    @media (min-width: 520px) {
      .buttons { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
    }
    button {
      cursor: pointer; padding: .75rem .5rem;
      border: none; border-radius: 8px; color: #fff;
      background: var(--btn-color);
      font-weight: 600; font-size: .98rem;
      transition: background .15s, transform .03s;
    }
    button:hover { background: var(--btn-color-hover); }
    button:active { transform: translateY(1px); }
    button.secondary {
      background: #94a3b8;
    }
    button.secondary:hover { background: #7b8aa3; }

    .output {
      margin-top: 1.25rem; padding: .9rem 1rem;
      background: #f0f5ff; border: 1px solid #d9e2ff;
      border-radius: 8px; min-height: 3.2rem;
    }
    .row { margin: .15rem 0; }
    .mono { font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", monospace; }
    .sr-only {
      position: absolute; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding: 0; margin: -1px;
      overflow: hidden; clip: rect(0,0,0,0); border: 0;
    }
  </style>
</head>
<body>
  <main class="container" role="main" aria-labelledby="title">
    <h1 id="title">HCF and LCM calculator</h1>
    <p class="helper">Enter two integers (for example, -12 and 18). The calculator accepts negatives and zeros.</p>

    <div class="grid" role="group" aria-labelledby="inputs-label">
      <span id="inputs-label" class="sr-only">Number inputs</span>

      <div>
        <label for="numA">First integer</label>
        <input
          id="numA"
          type="text"
          inputmode="numeric"
          pattern="^-?\d+$"
          placeholder="Number here"
          aria-describedby="errA"
          autocomplete="off"
        />
        <div id="errA" class="error" aria-live="polite"></div>
      </div>

      <div>
        <label for="numB">Second integer</label>
        <input
          id="numB"
          type="text"
          inputmode="numeric"
          pattern="^-?\d+$"
          placeholder="Another number here"
          aria-describedby="errB"
          autocomplete="off"
        />
        <div id="errB" class="error" aria-live="polite"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="buttons" role="group" aria-label="Actions">
      <button id="btnHCF" title="Calculate Highest Common Factor (a.k.a. GCD)">HCF</button>
      <button id="btnLCM" title="Calculate Least Common Multiple">LCM</button>
      <button id="btnBoth" title="Calculate both HCF and LCM">Both</button>
      <button id="btnClear" class="secondary" title="Clear inputs and results">Clear</button>
    </div>

    <section class="output" aria-live="polite" aria-atomic="true">
      <div class="row" id="outHCF"></div>
      <div class="row" id="outLCM"></div>
      <div class="row mono" id="outDetails"></div>
    </section>
  </main>

  <script>
    // Utility: strict integer parsing & validation
    function parseInteger(value) {
      // Require optional leading '-' and digits only
      if (!/^[-]?\d+$/.test(value.trim())) return { ok: false };
      // Safe integer check
      const n = Number(value);
      if (!Number.isSafeInteger(n)) return { ok: false };
      return { ok: true, value: n };
    }

    // Euclidean algorithm for GCD (HCF)
    function gcd(a, b) {
      a = Math.abs(a); b = Math.abs(b);
      // Define gcd(0,0) as 0 by convention here
      if (a === 0 && b === 0) return 0;
      while (b !== 0) {
        const t = b;
        b = a % b;
        a = t;
      }
      return a;
    }

    // LCM via |a*b| / gcd(a,b); define lcm(0, x) = 0 and lcm(0,0) = 0
    function lcm(a, b) {
      a = Math.abs(a); b = Math.abs(b);
      if (a === 0 || b === 0) return 0;
      return Math.floor((a / gcd(a, b)) * b); // order prevents overflow a*b
    }

    // DOM elements
    const numA = document.getElementById('numA');
    const numB = document.getElementById('numB');
    const errA = document.getElementById('errA');
    const errB = document.getElementById('errB');
    const outHCF = document.getElementById('outHCF');
    const outLCM = document.getElementById('outLCM');
    const outDetails = document.getElementById('outDetails');

    const btnHCF = document.getElementById('btnHCF');
    const btnLCM = document.getElementById('btnLCM');
    const btnBoth = document.getElementById('btnBoth');
    const btnClear = document.getElementById('btnClear');

    function clearErrors() { errA.textContent = ''; errB.textContent = ''; }
    function clearOutputs() { outHCF.textContent = ''; outLCM.textContent = ''; outDetails.textContent = ''; }

    function getInputs() {
      clearErrors();
      const aParsed = parseInteger(numA.value);
      const bParsed = parseInteger(numB.value);

      let ok = true;
      if (!aParsed.ok) {
        errA.textContent = 'Please enter a valid integer.';
        ok = false;
      }
      if (!bParsed.ok) {
        errB.textContent = 'Please enter a valid integer.';
        ok = false;
      }
      return ok ? { ok: true, a: aParsed.value, b: bParsed.value } : { ok: false };
    }

    function showHCF(a, b) {
      const g = gcd(a, b);
      outHCF.innerHTML = `<strong>HCF</strong> of ${a} and ${b} = <strong>${g}</strong>`;
      outDetails.textContent = '';
    }

    function showLCM(a, b) {
      const L = lcm(a, b);
      outLCM.innerHTML = `<strong>LCM</strong> of ${a} and ${b} = <strong>${L}</strong>`;
      outDetails.textContent = '';
    }

    function showBoth(a, b) {
      const g = gcd(a, b);
      const L = lcm(a, b);
      outHCF.innerHTML = `<strong>HCF</strong> of ${a} and ${b} = <strong>${g}</strong>`;
      outLCM.innerHTML = `<strong>LCM</strong> of ${a} and ${b} = <strong>${L}</strong>`;
    }

    // Wire up buttons
    btnHCF.addEventListener('click', () => {
      clearOutputs();
      const inp = getInputs();
      if (!inp.ok) return;
      showHCF(inp.a, inp.b);
    });

    btnLCM.addEventListener('click', () => {
      clearOutputs();
      const inp = getInputs();
      if (!inp.ok) return;
      showLCM(inp.a, inp.b);
    });

    btnBoth.addEventListener('click', () => {
      clearOutputs();
      const inp = getInputs();
      if (!inp.ok) return;
      showBoth(inp.a, inp.b);
    });

    btnClear.addEventListener('click', () => {
      numA.value = '';
      numB.value = '';
      clearErrors();
      clearOutputs();
      numA.focus();
    });

    // Also validate on-the-fly (optional nicety)
    [numA, numB].forEach((el, i) => {
      el.addEventListener('input', () => {
        const res = parseInteger(el.value);
        const errEl = i === 0 ? errA : errB;
        if (el.value.trim() === '') {
          errEl.textContent = '';
          return;
        }
        errEl.textContent = res.ok ? '' : 'Integers only (…, -2, -1, 0, 1, 2, …)';
      });
    });

    // Enter key triggers "Both"
    [numA, numB].forEach(el => {
      el.addEventListener('keydown', (e) => {
        if (e.key === 'Enter') {
          e.preventDefault();
          btnBoth.click();
        }
      });
    });
  </script>
</body>
</html>

```


## Version history {-}

v1.0: initial version created 03/26 by tdhc.
  
[This work is licensed under CC BY-NC-SA 4.0.](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/?ref=chooser-v1)
